사무엘하 22:1.content: David spoke to Yahweh the words of this song in the day that Yahweh delivered him out of the hand of all his enemies, and out of the hand of Saul,

사무엘하 22:2.content: and he said: “Yahweh is my rock, my fortress, and my deliverer, even mine;

사무엘하 22:3.content: God is my rock in whom I take refuge; my shield, and the horn of my salvation, my high tower, and my refuge. My savior, you save me from violence.

사무엘하 22:4.content: I call on Yahweh, who is worthy to be praised; So shall I be saved from my enemies.

사무엘하 22:5.content: For the waves of death surrounded me. The floods of ungodliness made me afraid.

사무엘하 22:6.content: The cords of Sheol were around me. The snares of death caught me.

사무엘하 22:7.content: In my distress, I called on Yahweh. Yes, I called to my God. He heard my voice out of his temple. My cry came into his ears.

사무엘하 22:8.content: Then the earth shook and trembled. The foundations of heaven quaked and were shaken, because he was angry.

사무엘하 22:9.content: Smoke went up out of his nostrils. Consuming fire came out of his mouth. Coals were kindled by it.

사무엘하 22:10.content: He bowed the heavens also, and came down. Thick darkness was under his feet.

사무엘하 22:11.content: He rode on a cherub, and flew. Yes, he was seen on the wings of the wind.

사무엘하 22:12.content: He made darkness a shelter around himself: gathering of waters, and thick clouds of the skies.

사무엘하 22:13.content: At the brightness before him, coals of fire were kindled.

사무엘하 22:14.content: Yahweh thundered from heaven. The Most High uttered his voice.

사무엘하 22:15.content: He sent out arrows, and scattered them; lightning, and confused them.

사무엘하 22:16.content: Then the channels of the sea appeared. The foundations of the world were laid bare by Yahweh’s rebuke, at the blast of the breath of his nostrils.

사무엘하 22:17.content: He sent from on high and he took me. He drew me out of many waters.

사무엘하 22:18.content: He delivered me from my strong enemy, from those who hated me, for they were too mighty for me.

사무엘하 22:19.content: They came on me in the day of my calamity, but Yahweh was my support.

사무엘하 22:20.content: He also brought me out into a large place. He delivered me, because he delighted in me.

사무엘하 22:21.content: Yahweh rewarded me according to my righteousness. He rewarded me according to the cleanness of my hands.

사무엘하 22:22.content: For I have kept Yahweh’s ways, and have not wickedly departed from my God.

사무엘하 22:23.content: For all his ordinances were before me. As for his statutes, I didn’t depart from them.

사무엘하 22:24.content: I was also perfect toward him. I kept myself from my iniquity.

사무엘하 22:25.content: Therefore Yahweh has rewarded me according to my righteousness, According to my cleanness in his eyesight.

사무엘하 22:26.content: With the merciful you will show yourself merciful. With the perfect man you will show yourself perfect.

사무엘하 22:27.content: With the pure you will show yourself pure. With the crooked you will show yourself shrewd.

사무엘하 22:28.content: You will save the afflicted people, But your eyes are on the arrogant, that you may bring them down.

사무엘하 22:29.content: For you are my lamp, Yahweh. Yahweh will light up my darkness.

사무엘하 22:30.content: For by you, I run against a troop. By my God, I leap over a wall.

사무엘하 22:31.content: As for God, his way is perfect. Yahweh’s word is tested. He is a shield to all those who take refuge in him.

사무엘하 22:32.content: For who is God, besides Yahweh? Who is a rock, besides our God?

사무엘하 22:33.content: God is my strong fortress. He makes my way perfect.

사무엘하 22:34.content: He makes his feet like hinds’ feet, and sets me on my high places.

사무엘하 22:35.content: He teaches my hands to war, so that my arms bend a bow of bronze.

사무엘하 22:36.content: You have also given me the shield of your salvation. Your gentleness has made me great.

사무엘하 22:37.content: You have enlarged my steps under me. My feet have not slipped.

사무엘하 22:38.content: I have pursued my enemies and destroyed them. I didn’t turn again until they were consumed.

사무엘하 22:39.content: I have consumed them, and struck them through, so that they can’t arise. Yes, they have fallen under my feet.

사무엘하 22:40.content: For you have armed me with strength for the battle. You have subdued under me those who rose up against me.

사무엘하 22:41.content: You have also made my enemies turn their backs to me, that I might cut off those who hate me.

사무엘하 22:42.content: They looked, but there was no one to save; even to Yahweh, but he didn’t answer them.

사무엘하 22:43.content: Then I beat them as small as the dust of the earth. I crushed them as the mire of the streets, and spread them abroad.

사무엘하 22:44.content: You also have delivered me from the strivings of my people. You have kept me to be the head of the nations. A people whom I have not known will serve me.

사무엘하 22:45.content: The foreigners will submit themselves to me. As soon as they hear of me, they will obey me.

사무엘하 22:46.content: The foreigners will fade away, and will come trembling out of their close places.

사무엘하 22:47.content: Yahweh lives! Blessed be my rock! Exalted be God, the rock of my salvation,

사무엘하 22:48.content: even the God who executes vengeance for me, who brings down peoples under me,

사무엘하 22:49.content: who brings me away from my enemies. Yes, you lift me up above those who rise up against me. You deliver me from the violent man.

사무엘하 22:50.content: Therefore I will give thanks to you, Yahweh, among the nations, and will sing praises to your name.

사무엘하 22:51.content: He gives great deliverance to his king, and shows loving kindness to his anointed, to David and to his offspring, forever more.”
